infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Stick Around needs access to your photos so you can pick a profile picture for your pet.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Stick Around uses your camera so you can take a profile picture of your pet.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Stick Around uses your location to flag local risks for your pet — pavement temperature warnings, known contamination sites near you, and regional concerns like tick zones or wildlife. Location is used in the moment and never stored.
